mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.cover_img, a.state, c.category_name AS category, u.nickname AS create_user, a.create_time FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN "user" u ON a.create_user = u.id WHERE a.create_user = #{userId} AND a.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.cover_img, a.state, c.category_name AS category, u.username AS create_user, a.create_time FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN "user" u ON a.create_user = u.id WHERE a.category_id = #{categoryId} AND a.create_user = #{userId}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.cover_img, a.state, c.category_name AS category, u.username AS create_user, a.create_time FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN "user" u ON a.create_user = u.id WHERE a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
